Implementation: Evaluated corpus, regional corpus, comparable 14C base, human-presence subset and diagnostic subset.
IntCal20 for terrestrial dates; Marine20 for marine shell dates with the reservoir corrections used in the local models.
Dates from the same archaeological context are grouped to reduce over-weighting.
Main curves use the 45-25 ka 14C BP input window and are plotted from 50 to 25 ka cal BP.
Main bandwidth is 200 yr, checked against 100 and 300 yr and against unbinned curves.
Local sequence structure is carried into regional models focused on order, separation and sensitivity.
Data, scripts, OxCal code, tables and figures are retained with the project outputs.
